channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: American Music Awards air tonight with star-studded performances
item.description: The American Music Awards celebrate fan favorites in the music world and feature performances from multiple artists.

item.title: Pope urges strict AI oversight in new manifesto
item.description: Pope Leo XIV has called for strong regulation of artificial intelligence, urging developers to prioritize the common good over profit.

item.title: Iran live updates: Trump says critics of Iran deal lack understanding of possible agreement
item.description: On Feb. 28, President Donald Trump announced major combat operations against Iran, including large joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

item.title: Vietnam veterans see true loyalty in opposing Trump's D.C. arch project
item.description: A veteran suing to stop the arch's construction told CBS News it shows disrespect to fallen comrades.
